title: ZedExams — Practise Smart. Pass Confidently.
body: Admin Panel 🏠 Learner Dashboard 📊 Dashboard ▦ Lessons 📖 Create Lesson ✏️ Create Quiz 📤 Upload Paper 📁 Manage Content 🔔 Approvals 🧑‍🏫 Teacher Apps 📈 Results 💳 Payments M Mahenga Mwelwa 🚪 Sign Out CREATE LESSON Choose how you want to build Every option creates the same final structure: a native slide lesson that learners can play inside the website. ▦ Slide Builder Create each slide by choosing a layout and filling in the fields. ✦ Quick Lesson Paste notes and convert them into editable presentation slides. P Import PowerPoint Upload a .pptx file and convert its slides into editable lesson slides. ▣ PowerPoint Viewer Preserve the original presentation layout and play it slide by slide.
